name: Frame Capture
description: Capture a single frame or periodic frames from an RTSP camera. This package is a reference service for the Services tab.

messageBus.description: Supports Redis stream/pubsub input and output when service instance message bindings are enabled.

configSchema.label: Camera source
configSchema.help: Use an existing camera from Cameras & ROI, or manually enter a URL/path.

configSchema.label: Camera from Cameras & ROI
configSchema.help: When selected, the service uses the camera RTSP URL and exposes its ROI/zone summary.

configSchema.label: Manual camera URL
configSchema.help: Used only when Camera source is Manual input URL. RTSP URL or a local video/image path for testing.

configSchema.label: Output camera ID override
configSchema.help: Optional. Leave blank to use the selected camera ID.

configSchema.label: Zone polygon optional
configSchema.help: Optional polygon coordinates for services that need a camera zone.
